title: War-Hammers
description: adds warhammer as a new tool/weapon
body:
[![Logo](https://img1.wsimg.com/isteam/ip/b3784fc8-73a8-4ed5-9033-feb6c6f2806c/blob-19e676c.png/:/rs=w:149,h:149,cg:true,m/cr=w:149,h:149/qt=q:95)](https://exlinemods.com/) Explore Exline Mods for top-notch gaming accessories and mods. Elevate your gaming experience with our high-quality products. Visit exlinemods.com now to gear up and enhance your gameplay! This mod add a new tool/weapon, the War-hammer. There is Wooden, Stone, Golden, Iron, Diamond and Netherite War-hammers.
The War-Hammer acts like a pickaxe, allowing you to mine with it, yet stronger than a sword or axe and slower.
Crafting a War-hammer requires 5 pieces of the material you want to make it out of, and 2 sticks.
